title: Garp’s Last Stand on Hachinosu
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Marines, Unknown person #1, York, Garp, Unknown person #2, Kuzan as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that you mention it, it does look like their armored hills have been caved in with punches...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: vice Admiral GARP. Ever since his youth, he made this part of his daily routine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's AOKJI's handiwork. The former Admiral was GARP's protege.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rules were no haki or fruit abilities allowed while working on the "battle- ship bags."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just goes to show that no one's born a hero...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a strength you have to earn!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He sent San Juan Wolf Flying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We gotta pull him up quick!! He'll drown!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'You bastard, are 'You trying to destroy pirate Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's totally outnumber- Ed and he isn't even flinching!!

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
